sanskrit:
य इदं परमं गुह्यं मद्भक्तेष्वभिधास्यति।
भक्तिं मयि परां कृत्वा मामेवैष्यत्यसंशयः॥
transliteration:
ya idaṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ mad-bhakteṣv abhidhāsyati |
bhaktiṃ mayi parāṃ kṛtvā mām evaiṣyaty asaṃśayaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Whoever this supreme secret among My devotees will declare, having done transcendental devotion to Me, to Me alone he will come—no doubt.
contextual_meaning: Sharing one’s deepest truth within a trusted circle is itself a devotional act that re-wires the brain for secure attachment to the Sacred.
psychological_state: Earned security: the shift from anxious/preoccupied attachment to a felt sense of being held by the Divine.
trigger_scenario: A therapist decides to open up about their contemplative practice only in peer-consultation groups, experiencing deeper self-acceptance and less burnout.
anchor_text: Share your deepest truth with trusted hearts to feel safely held by the Sacred.
